untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of 'trending_time_percentage' (% of time in trending conditions over 252 periods), which requires custom multi-period regime classification logic not expressible with single-bar indicators. ADX >= 25 approximates trend strength but cannot replicate the rolling percentage calculation specified in the rule.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 >= 25 as proxy for trend-following regime activation (signal's 'trending_condition_threshold >= 0.4'). Exit condition set to ADX < 20 as reasonable reversal indicator when trend strength weakens. The core regime-detection requirement (trending_time_percentage rolling calculation) cannot be expressed within allowed single-bar indicators and would require custom metric computation in backtest engine. Minimum 4-hour holding period maps to position holding constraint but specific timeframe validation cannot be enforced at indicator level.
